$comment: Project-level Claude Code settings. The hook below demonstrates auto-triggering a skill when a meeting transcript lands on disk — exactly the kind of ambient workflow we want every the enterprise engineer to have without thinking about it.

hooks.command: node -e "let s='';process.stdin.on('data',d=>s+=d).on('end',()=>{try{const e=JSON.parse(s);const p=e.tool_input&&e.tool_input.file_path||'';if(/transcript.*\\.md$/i.test(p)){console.log(JSON.stringify({hookSpecificOutput:{hookEventName:'PostToolUse',additionalContext:'Transcript detected at '+p+' — invoke the meeting-killer skill or /meeting-killer slash command to extract action items.'}}));}}catch(_){}})"
